info.title: StreamFlix Billing Service API
info.description: Subscription management, payment processing, and billing cycle management for the StreamFlix streaming platform

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific subscription plan
Retrieve the authenticated user's subscription details

post.description: Create a new subscription for the authenticated user

put.description: Upgrade to a higher tier subscription plan
Downgrade to a lower tier subscription plan

get.description: Retrieve all payment methods for the authenticated user

post.description: Add a new payment method to the authenticated user's account

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific payment method

delete.description: Remove a payment method from the authenticated user's account

get.description: Retrieve billing history and invoices for the authenticated user
Retrieve details of a specific invoice
Retrieve billing cycle information for the authenticated user

post.description: Validate and get details of a promotional code
Apply a promotional code to the user's subscription

get.description: Retrieve all applied discounts for the authenticated user

delete.description: Remove an applied discount from the authenticated user's subscription

description.example: Full access to all content including 4K streaming

feedback.example: Plan is too expensive for my usage

applicablePlans.description: Plan names this code applies to (empty means all plans)

maxUsages.description: Maximum number of times this code can be used
